archimate:Principle.name: 2. Promote Reusability and Avoid Redundancy
archimate:Principle.documentation: By designing reusable digital twin assets, such as software, data models, and AI algorithms, LDT CitiVERSE EDIC will prevent redundant development efforts, allowing cities to allocate resources more efficiently. This approach supports cost-effective urban development, fosters a collaborative environment, and reinforces the supply chain by pooling assets and resources across regions, reducing dependency on external vendors by deploying an EDIC catalogue for tools and solutions for LDT
